steps.action: Login as manager and open Request Hire dialog in Approvals.
steps.observed: Dialog opened with required fields and accepted manager input.

steps.expected: Request appears in approval queue with Pending Approval status.
steps.observed: Row `VAL-APPROVAL-001 planning-approval-core` appeared with status `Pending` and step `1 / 3`.

assertions.title: Submit compensation change request

steps.action: Attempt to submit compensation change from UI (request surfaces + employee panel).
steps.expected: Manager can submit salary change 130K -> 155K with justification.
steps.observed: UI only exposed generic `Request Hire` flow and employee `Save Changes`; no compensation-change submission entry point found.

steps.action: Check for delta display in queue/form.
steps.observed: No compensation-change request/delta UI was available.

evidence.network: No UI request path observed for comp_change submission.

assertions.issues: Compensation-change submission UX (and delta rendering) is missing from tested UI path.

assertions.title: Request includes budget impact summary

steps.action: Inspect submitter Request Hire budget-impact section.
steps.expected: Current spend, projected spend, remaining budget, utilization %.
steps.observed: Only `Projected total cost` and `Routed to approval chain` displayed.

steps.expected: Same budget impact summary visible to approver.
steps.observed: Approver detail showed projected cost/salary/equity only; required summary fields absent.

evidence.network: Standard headcount request list/load requests observed; no UI evidence of required budget summary payload surfaced.

assertions.issues: Required budget impact metrics are not rendered on submitter or approver surfaces.

steps.action: Submit high-cost request configured to Finance 4-step chain.
Approve sequentially as Manager -> VP -> Finance -> CHRO.
steps.expected: Request advances one step each approval with completed-step indicators.
steps.observed: Progress moved `1/4 -> 2/4 -> 3/4 -> 4/4`, then status became `Approved`; audit trail logged all approvals.

assertions.title: Approver sees only their pending items

steps.action: Open VP Approvals dashboard while queue contains manager-pending, VP-pending, and finance-pending requests.
steps.observed: VP view displayed manager-pending rows (`1 / 3`, View), VP-pending row (`2 / 3` actionable), and finance-pending row (`3 / 4`, View).

evidence.network: GET /api/orgs/69e29b4cbc5703b857f52ac7/headcount-requests and /pending calls observed in VP session.

assertions.issues: Dashboard surfaces non-VP-pending items, contrary to assertion requirement.

assertions.title: Conditional routing based on cost and level

steps.observed: Routed to `Finance 4-step planning-approval-core` (Manager -> VP -> Finance -> CHRO).

steps.expected: Director-level includes CHRO even below cost threshold.
steps.observed: Routed to `Director 3-step planning-approval-core` with CHRO included.

evidence.network: POST /api/scenarios/69e29b4cbc5703b857f52aca/headcount-requests observed for each route case; resulting chain IDs mapped to 3-step/4-step configurations.

steps.action: As Manager, approve high-cost request from queue.
steps.expected: Request advances to next step and leaves manager actionable queue.
steps.observed: Request moved to `2 / 4` and changed to `View` for manager.

steps.expected: Next approver sees request pending in their queue.
steps.observed: VP queue showed the request at VP step and actionable controls.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e29c6cbc5703b857f52c02/approve observed; subsequent queue GETs reflected next-step assignment.

assertions.title: Self-approval prevention

steps.action: View manager-submitted pending requests as manager.
steps.expected: Disabled `Approve` button with tooltip `You cannot approve your own request.`
steps.observed: Rows displayed `View` action only; expected disabled Approve+tooltip UI was not present.

evidence.network: No own-request approve action available from UI; own rows were non-actionable `View` only.

assertions.issues: Self-approval is blocked functionally, but required disabled-button tooltip UX is not implemented as specified.

frictions.description: agent-browser element refs became stale after auth/navigation transitions, causing intermittent click timeouts.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran `snapshot -i` before each post-navigation interaction and retried with refreshed refs.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-APPROVAL-001, 004, 006, 007) and 4 failed (VAL-APPROVAL-002, 003, 005, 013). Main failures were missing comp-change submission UX, incomplete budget-impact UI, VP queue visibility scope, and missing self-approval tooltip UX.
